products.name: KB Masale Dhaniya Powder (Coriander Powder) 50gm
products.description: KB Masale Dhaniya Powder is made from carefully selected, high-quality coriander seeds, finely ground to deliver fresh aroma and mild, earthy flavor. It enhances the taste of curries, vegetables, and gravies, making your dishes more delicious and aromatic. Hygienically processed and packed to ensure purity and freshness.

more_details.Key Features:
100% Pure and Natural Coriander Powder

Made from premium quality coriander seeds

Fresh aroma and mild, authentic flavor

No added colors or preservatives

Finely ground for easy mixing

Hygienically processed and packed

Ideal for everyday cooking
more_details.Storage Tips: Store in a cool and dry place. Keep in an airtight container after opening.

products.name: KB Masale Haldi Powder – 500g
products.description: KB Masale Haldi Powder is prepared from carefully selected turmeric roots, finely ground to deliver bright color, rich aroma, and authentic flavor. Ideal for everyday cooking, it adds taste, color, and quality to your meals. Hygienically packed to ensure purity and long-lasting freshness.

more_details.Key Features:
100% Pure and Natural Turmeric

Made from high-quality turmeric roots

Bright yellow color with rich aroma

Enhances taste and appearance of dishes

No added colors or preservatives

Finely ground for easy mixing

Hygienically processed and packed

Suitable for everyday cooking

products.name: KB Masale Isabgol Bhusi (Psyllium Husk) 50g
products.description: KB Masale Isabgol Bhusi is made from high-quality psyllium husk, known for its natural fiber content. It supports healthy digestion and helps maintain regular bowel movement. Light, natural, and easy to consume, it is hygienically processed and packed to ensure purity and freshness.

more_details.Key Features:
100% Natural Psyllium Husk

Rich source of dietary fiber

Supports healthy digestion

Helps maintain regular bowel movement

No added chemicals or preservatives

Light and easy to consume

Hygienically processed and packed
more_details.Storage Tips: Store in a cool and dry place away from moisture. Keep container tightly closed after use.

products.name: KB Masale Jeera Powder (Cumin Powder) 50gm
products.description: KB Masale Jeera Powder is made from premium quality cumin seeds, carefully roasted and finely ground to deliver a rich aroma and warm, earthy flavor. It enhances the taste of a variety of dishes including curries, vegetables, dals, and snacks. Hygienically processed and packed to ensure freshness, purity, and consistent quality.

more_details.Key Features:
100% Pure and Natural Cumin Powder

Made from high-quality cumin seeds

Rich aroma and authentic flavor

Finely ground for easy blending

No added colors or preservatives

Hygienically processed and packed

Ideal for everyday cooking
more_details.Storage Tips: Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep in an airtight container after opening.

products.name: KB Masale Kasmiri Red Chilli Powder 1kg
KB Masale Red Chilli Powder – 500g
products.description: KB Masale Red Chilli Powder is made from carefully selected, sun-dried red chillies, finely ground to deliver vibrant natural color, rich aroma, and perfect spiciness. It enhances the taste and appearance of all your dishes, making them more flavorful and appetizing. Hygienically processed and packed to maintain freshness and purity for a longer duration.

more_details.Key Features:
Made from premium quality red chillies

Bright natural color and rich flavor

Consistent spice level

No added colors or preservatives

Finely ground and hygienically packed
more_details.Storage Tips: Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep in an airtight container after opening.

products.name: KB Masale Red Chilli Powder – 50g

Hygienically processed and packed to retain its natural goodness.
